item.name: Blue Marlin
item.description:
A large saltwater fish whose lustrous skin seems to shimmer even without sunlight.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: To stare at this wavekin's cerulean body is to gaze upon the unspoiled waters of the southern seas. Unfortunately, once the creature dies, its lazuline beauty decays to a coal black, rendering its scales unworkable for cosmetic purposes.
